summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MyBase new features: Tags Management, Custom Types, Sub-projects, and Mind Map. Backend 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed with minor React Flow edge rendering issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Edges not rendering visually - React Flow warning: 'Couldn't create edge for source handle id: null'. Custom node type missing source/target handles.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Add sourceHandle and targetHandle to custom node component or use default node type with handles

issues: Missing aria-describedby for accessibility - Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}

passed_tests: Auth: Login with existing credentials (test2@test.com)
Auth: Register new user
Tags Management: Create tag with name/color/category
Tags Management: Get all tags with usage_count
Tags Management: Update tag (name, color, category)
Tags Management: Delete tag (removes from all items)
Custom Types: Create type with custom fields (Vinyles with artist/year)
Custom Types: Get all types filtered by category
Custom Types: Update type fields
Custom Types: Delete type
Projects Sub-projects: Create parent project
Projects Sub-projects: Create sub-project with parent_id
Projects Sub-projects: Update project parent_id
Projects Sub-projects: Delete parent project
Tasks: Create task assigned to project
Tasks: Get tasks filtered by project_id
Tasks: Task displays with project name in list
Mind Map: Get mindmap data with nodes/edges
Mind Map: Filter by type perspective
Mind Map: Sub-project relationships in edges
Collections: Create without icon field
Collections: Icon field NOT present in dialog (verified)
Dashboard: Stats display correct counts
action_items: Fix React Flow edge rendering: Add sourcePosition and targetPosition to node edges, or add Handle components to CustomNode
Add DialogDescription to dialogs for accessibility (low priority)
critical_code_review_comments: MindmapPage.js: CustomNode component needs source/target handles for edges to connect properly
Mind map edges are being created in the data but not rendering visually due to missing handles on custom node

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows work, minor edge rendering issue)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Tags, Custom Types, Sub-projects, Mind Map) are working. Mind map shows nodes correctly but edges don't visually connect due to React Flow custom node missing handles. Backend APIs 100% functional. French language interface working throughout.
